name: EdwRcvdIncmSbsdyDtlFRunCycUpdt_EE

text.value: WITH cte_min AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'FINANCE' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND SRC_SYS_CD = 'BCBSFINANCE' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.RunCycle} GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE T SET T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T JOIN cte_min M ON T.TRGT_SYS_CD = M.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = M.SUBJ_CD AND T.SRC_SYS_CD = M.SRC_SYS_CD WHERE T.RUN_CYC_NO >= M.RUN_CYC_NO AND T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:
Called by:
                  IdsRcvdIncmSbsdyDtlFCntl

Description: 

P_RUN_CYCLE update for RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for that one particular run cycle
JobName:
EdwRcvdIncmSbsdyDtlFRunCycUpdt_EE
It does EDW Income Counts Monthly P_RUN_CYC Update
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Commission with a value "N" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN  where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle
